revision.text:
'''辛卯'''（かのとう、しんぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて28番目で、前は[[庚寅]]、次は[[壬辰]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==辛卯の年==
==辛卯の日== ===[[選日]]=== 辛卯の日は[[十方暮]]の8日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''辛卯'''（かのとう、しんきんのうさぎ、しんきんのう、しんぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの28番目で、前は[[庚寅]]、次は[[壬辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==辛卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って31が余る年が辛卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[31年]] *[[91年]] *[[151年]] *[[211年]] *[[271年]] *[[331年]] *[[391年]] *[[451年]] *[[511年]] *[[571年]] *[[631年]] *[[691年]] *[[751年]] *[[811年]] *[[871年]] *[[931年]] *[[991年]] | *[[1051年]] *[[1111年]] *[[1171年]] *[[1231年]] *[[1291年]] *[[1351年]] *[[1411年]] *[[1471年]] *[[1531年]] *[[1591年]] *[[1651年]] *[[1711年]] *[[1771年]] *[[1831年]] *[[1891年]] *[[1951年]] | *[[2011年]] *[[2071年]] *[[2131年]] *[[2191年]] *[[2251年]] *[[2311年]] *[[2371年]] *[[2431年]] *[[2491年]] *[[2551年]] *[[2611年]] *[[2671年]] *[[2731年]] *[[2791年]] *[[2851年]] *[[2911年]] *[[2971年]] |}
==辛卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[2月]]が辛卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛卯の日== 辛卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛卯の日は[[十方暮]]の8日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛卯]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:辛卯]]

==辛卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って31が余る年が辛卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[31年]] *[[91年]] *[[151年]] *[[211年]] *[[271年]] *[[331年]] *[[391年]] *[[451年]] *[[511年]] *[[571年]] *[[631年]] *[[691年]] *[[751年]] *[[811年]] *[[871年]] *[[931年]] *[[991年]] | *[[1051年]] *[[1111年]] *[[1171年]] *[[1231年]] *[[1291年]] *[[1351年]] *[[1411年]] *[[1471年]] *[[1531年]] *[[1591年]] *[[1651年]] *[[1711年]] *[[1771年]] *[[1831年]] *[[1891年]] *[[1951年]] | *[[2011年]] *[[2071年]] *[[2131年]] *[[2191年]] *[[2251年]] *[[2311年]] *[[2371年]] *[[2431年]] *[[2491年]] *[[2551年]] *[[2611年]] *[[2671年]] *[[2731年]] *[[2791年]] *[[2851年]] *[[2911年]] *[[2971年]] |}
==辛卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[2月]]が辛卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛卯の日== 辛卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛卯の日は[[十方暮]]の8日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Rabbit}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:辛卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]]

==辛卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って31が余る年が辛卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[31年]] *[[91年]] *[[151年]] *[[211年]] *[[271年]] *[[331年]] *[[391年]] *[[451年]] *[[511年]] *[[571年]] *[[631年]] *[[691年]] *[[751年]] *[[811年]] *[[871年]] *[[931年]] *[[991年]] | *[[1051年]] *[[1111年]] *[[1171年]] *[[1231年]] *[[1291年]] *[[1351年]] *[[1411年]] *[[1471年]] *[[1531年]] *[[1591年]] *[[1651年]] *[[1711年]] *[[1771年]] *[[1831年]] *[[1891年]] *[[1951年]] | *[[2011年]] *[[2071年]] *[[2131年]] *[[2191年]] *[[2251年]] *[[2311年]] *[[2371年]] *[[2431年]] *[[2491年]] *[[2551年]] *[[2611年]] *[[2671年]] *[[2731年]] *[[2791年]] *[[2851年]] *[[2911年]] *[[2971年]] |}
==辛卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[2月]]が辛卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛卯の日== 辛卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛卯の日は[[十方暮]]の8日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Rabbit}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:辛卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Metal Rabbit]]

==辛卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って31が余る年が辛卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[31年]] *[[91年]] *[[151年]] *[[211年]] *[[271年]] *[[331年]] *[[391年]] *[[451年]] *[[511年]] *[[571年]] *[[631年]] *[[691年]] *[[751年]] *[[811年]] *[[871年]] *[[931年]] *[[991年]] | *[[1051年]] *[[1111年]] *[[1171年]] *[[1231年]] *[[1291年]] *[[1351年]] *[[1411年]] *[[1471年]] *[[1531年]] *[[1591年]] *[[1651年]] *[[1711年]] *[[1771年]] *[[1831年]] *[[1891年]] *[[1951年]] | *[[2011年]] *[[2071年]] *[[2131年]] *[[2191年]] *[[2251年]] *[[2311年]] *[[2371年]] *[[2431年]] *[[2491年]] *[[2551年]] *[[2611年]] *[[2671年]] *[[2731年]] *[[2791年]] *[[2851年]] *[[2911年]] *[[2971年]] |}
==辛卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[2月]]が辛卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛卯の日== 辛卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛卯の日は[[十方暮]]の8日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:辛卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Metal Rabbit]] [[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 辛卯'''（かのとう、しんきんのうさぎ、しんきんのう、しんぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの28番目で、前は[[庚寅]]、次は[[壬辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==辛卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って31が余る年が辛卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[31年]] *[[91年]] *[[151年]] *[[211年]] *[[271年]] *[[331年]] *[[391年]] *[[451年]] *[[511年]] *[[571年]] *[[631年]] *[[691年]] *[[751年]] *[[811年]] *[[871年]] *[[931年]] *[[991年]] | *[[1051年]] *[[1111年]] *[[1171年]] *[[1231年]] *[[1291年]] *[[1351年]] *[[1411年]] *[[1471年]] *[[1531年]] *[[1591年]] *[[1651年]] *[[1711年]] *[[1771年]] *[[1831年]] *[[1891年]] *[[1951年]] | *[[2011年]] *[[2071年]] *[[2131年]] *[[2191年]] *[[2251年]] *[[2311年]] *[[2371年]] *[[2431年]] *[[2491年]] *[[2551年]] *[[2611年]] *[[2671年]] *[[2731年]] *[[2791年]] *[[2851年]] *[[2911年]] *[[2971年]] |}
==辛卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[2月]]が辛卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==辛卯の日== 辛卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛卯の日は[[十方暮]]の8日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] ==辛卯の日== 辛卯の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 辛卯の日は[[十方暮]]の8日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:辛卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:辛卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:qq]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Metal Rabbit]] [[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]] [[af:Metaalhaas (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sin-cṳ̄de]][[de:Metall-Hasenei]][[en:Metal Rabbit]][[fr:Lièvre de métalboishak]][[it:Sin-chṳ́id]][[ja:Xinwaja]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haseni]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sincceij]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]][[zh-yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq---qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:X" to "[[sn:"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.

[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|旧暦|1=" to "|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq="
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|卯}}" to "|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pgoodbye $1]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Yin-Yang and the Five Elements" to "Yin-Yang and the Five Phases"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Phases|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and the Five Phases}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Deprecated 11 open]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮}} cycle.
== References == {{Reflist}}
[[Category:Selection Days]] [[Category:Chinese Calendar]] [[Category:Wu Xing]] [[ja:辛卯]]
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] <!--Yin Metal Rabbit-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Metal Rabbit}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:辛卯]][[Category:辛卯]]<!--Yin Metal Rabbit-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Metal Rabbit}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:11]] [[ja:辛卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:11]] [[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:11]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:11]] [[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:11]][[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:in Metal Rabbit]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Metal Rabbit]][[Category:11]] [[sn:in Metal Rabbit]] [[ja:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[de:Metall-Hase]] [[af:Metaalhaas (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sin-cṳ̄de]][[de:Metall-Hasenei]][[en:Metal Rabbit]][[fr:Lièvre de métalboishak]][[it:Sin-chṳ́id]][[sn:inwaja]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haseni]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sincceij]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]][[zh-yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|庚寅|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|壬辰|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=draft|12=draft}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=draft|12=draft}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木|12=draft|12=draft}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|12=draft|12=draft}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
== Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[31]] * [[91]] * [[151]] * [[211]] * [[271]] * [[331]] * [[391]] * [[451]] * [[511]] * [[571]] * [[631]] * [[691]] * [[751]] * [[811]] * [[871]] * [[931]] * [[991]] | * [[1051]] * [[1111]] * [[1171]] * [[1231]] * [[1291]] * [[1351]] * [[1411]] * [[1471]] * [[1531]] * [[1591]] * [[1651]] * [[1711]] * [[1771]] * [[1831]] * [[1891]] * [[1951]] | * [[2011]] * [[2071]] * [[2131]] * [[2191]] * [[2251]] * [[2311]] * [[2371]] * [[2431]] * [[2491]] * [[2551]] * [[2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[2911]] * [[2971]] |}
== Months of the Yin Metal Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月|12=draft|12=draft}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明|12=draft|12=draft}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Metal Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=draft|12=draft}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062275]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-māu]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[hak:Sîn-mâu]][[ja:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haas]][[uk:Темний металевий заєць]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sinmaux]][[zh_min_nan:Sin-báu]][[zh_yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062275]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-māu]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[hak:Sîn-mâu]][[ja:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haas]][[uk:Темний металевий заєць]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sinmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-báu]][[zh-yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062275]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம்
