==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

(element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-māu]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[hak:Sîn-mâu]][[ja:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haas]][[uk:Темний металевий заєць]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sinmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-báu]][[zh-yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062275]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன overcoming|ja|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.

--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-māu]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[hak:Sîn-mâu]][[ja:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haas]][[uk:Темний металевий заєць]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sinmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-báu]][[zh-yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062275]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-māu]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[hak:Sîn-mâu]][[ja:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haas]][[uk:Темний металевий заєць]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sinmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-báu]][[zh-yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062275]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:31|31]] * [[:en:91|91]] * [[:en:151|151]] * [[:en:211|211]] * [[:en:271|271]] * [[:en:331|331]] * [[:en:391|391]] * [[:en:451|451]] * [[:en:511|511]] * [[:en:571|571]] * [[:en:631|631]] * [[:en:691|691]] * [[:en:751|751]] * [[:en:811|811]] * [[:en:871|871]] * [[:en:931|931]] * [[:en:991|991]] | * [[:en:1051|1051]] * [[:en:1111|1111]] * [[:en:1171|1171]] * [[:en:1231|1231]] * [[:en:1291|1291]] * [[:en:1351|1351]] * [[:en:1411|1411]] * [[:en:1471|1471]] * [[:en:1531|1531]] * [[:en:1591|1591]] * [[:en:1651|1651]] * [[:en:1711|1711]] * [[:en:1771|1771]] * [[:en:1831|1831]] * [[:en:1891|1891]] * [[:en:1951|1951]] | * [[:en:2011|2011]] * [[:en:2071|2071]] * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal
