{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- !{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium}} |- | * {{ill|31|en|31|WD=Q225051|lt=31}} * {{ill|91|en|91|WD=Q1166426|lt=91}} * {{ill|151|en|151|WD=Q30291|lt=151}} * {{ill|211|en|211|WD=Q30566|lt=211}} * {{ill|271|en|271|WD=Q32124|lt=271}} * {{ill|331|en|331|WD=Q37117|lt=331}} * {{ill|391|en|391|WD=Q48113|lt=391}} * {{ill|451|en|451|WD=Q30070|lt=451}} * {{ill|511|en|511|WD=Q31910|lt=511}} * {{ill|571|en|571|WD=Q30475|lt=571}} * {{ill|631|en|631|WD=Q31577|lt=631}} * {{ill|691|en|691|WD=Q23474|lt=691}} * {{ill|751|en|751|WD=Q23634|lt=751}} * {{ill|811|en|811|WD=Q29946|lt=811}} * {{ill|871|en|871|WD=Q24754|lt=871}} * {{ill|931|en|931|WD=Q24789|lt=931}} * {{ill|991|en|991|WD=Q24097|lt=991}} | * {{ill|1051|en|1051|WD=Q19363|lt=1051}} * {{ill|1111|en|1111|WD=Q19522|lt=1111}} * {{ill|1171|en|1171|WD=Q19685|lt=1171}} * {{ill|1231|en|1231|WD=Q5417|lt=1231}} * {{ill|1291|en|1291|WD=Q5554|lt=1291}} * {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351}} * {{ill|1411|en|1411|WD=Q6155|lt=1411}} * {{ill|1471|en|1471|WD=Q6577|lt=1471}} * {{ill|1531|en|1531|WD=Q6431|lt=1531}} * {{ill|1591|en|1591|WD=Q6766|lt=1591}} * {{ill|1651|en|1651|WD=Q6956|lt=1651}} * {{ill|1711|en|1711|WD=Q6866|lt=1711}} * {{ill|1771|en|1771|WD=Q7686|lt=1771}} * {{ill|1831|en|1831|WD=Q7579|lt=1831}} * {{ill|1891|en|1891|WD=Q7837|lt=1891}} * {{ill|1951|en|1951|WD=Q18591|lt=1951}} | * {{ill|2011|en|2011|WD=Q1994|lt=2011}} * {{ill|2071|en|2071|WD=Q890598|lt=2071}} * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit''' |- !{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium}} |- | * {{ill|31|en|31|WD=Q225051|lt=31}} * {{ill|91|en|91|WD=Q1166426|lt=91}} * {{ill|151|en|151|WD=Q30291|lt=151}} * {{ill|211|en|211|WD=Q30566|lt=211}} * {{ill|271|en|271|WD=Q32124|lt=271}} * {{ill|331|en|331|WD=Q37117|lt=331}} * {{ill|391|en|391|WD=Q48113|lt=391}} * {{ill|451|en|451|WD=Q30070|lt=451}} * {{ill|511|en|511|WD=Q31910|lt=511}} * {{ill|571|en|571|WD=Q30475|lt=571}} * {{ill|631|en|631|WD=Q31577|lt=631}} * {{ill|691|en|691|WD=Q23474|lt=691}} * {{ill|751|en|751|WD=Q23634|lt=751}} * {{ill|811|en|811|WD=Q29946|lt=811}} * {{ill|871|en|871|WD=Q24754|lt=871}} * {{ill|931|en|931|WD=Q24789|lt=931}} * {{ill|991|en|991|WD=Q24097|lt=991}} | * {{ill|1051|en|1051|WD=Q19363|lt=1051}} * {{ill|1111|en|1111|WD=Q19522|lt=1111}} * {{ill|1171|en|1171|WD=Q19685|lt=1171}} * {{ill|1231|en|1231|WD=Q5417|lt=1231}} * {{ill|1291|en|1291|WD=Q5554|lt=1291}} * {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351}} * {{ill|1411|en|1411|WD=Q6155|lt=1411}} * {{ill|1471|en|1471|WD=Q6577|lt=1471}} * {{ill|1531|en|1531|WD=Q6431|lt=1531}} * {{ill|1591|en|1591|WD=Q6766|lt=1591}} * {{ill|1651|en|1651|WD=Q6956|lt=1651}} * {{ill|1711|en|1711|WD=Q6866|lt=1711}} * {{ill|1771|en|1771|WD=Q7686|lt=1771}} * {{ill|1831|en|1831|WD=Q7579|lt=1831}} * {{ill|1891|en|1891|WD=Q7837|lt=1891}} * {{ill|1951|en|1951|WD=Q18591|lt=1951}} | * {{ill|2011|en|2011|WD=Q1994|lt=2011}} * {{ill|2071|en|2071|WD=Q890598|lt=2071}} * [[:en:2131|2131]] * [[:en:2191|2191]] * [[:en:2251|2251]] * [[:en:2311|2311]] * [[:en:2371|2371]] * [[:en:2431|2431]] * [[:en:2491|2491]] * [[2551]] * [[:en:2611|2611]] * [[2671]] * [[2731]] * [[2791]] * [[2851]] * [[:en:2911|2911]] * [[:en:2971|2971]] |}
==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|ltq=Qingming}}) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: shinmi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
<!-- == * Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのとうさぎ (kanoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんかのうさぎ (shinka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: しんぼう (shinbō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit ==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.
==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: shinmi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão

Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rabbit|kanji=辛卯|romaji=kanoto usagi|onyomi=shinbō|p=xīmǎo|w=hsin-mao|mi=ɕin⁵³ mɑʊ̯|y=san1 maau5|j=san1 maau5|ci=sɐn maːu̯|mc=sin maw|oc-bs=sin maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Geng Yin|ja|1=Yang Metal Tiger|2=ja|庚寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Ren Chen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: shinmi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão

==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: shinmi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão

==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe|1=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} cycle.
